arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the virtual node.

created_date.description: The date and time when the virtual node was created.

id.description: The unique identifier for the virtual node.

last_updated_date.description: The date and time when the virtual node was last updated.

mesh_owner.description: The AWS account ID of the service mesh owner.

resource_owner.description: The AWS account ID of the resource owner.

spec.description: The specification details of the virtual node, including backend services, listeners, logging, and service discovery settings.

tags.description: A map of tags associated with the virtual node.
